shared_parts: lesson IDs, Darija Latin, Moroccan audio, image/video references, progress logic
rule: Each locale feels like its own site but uses the shared Darija core.

independent_parts: level goal, days, situations, phrases, media set, progress, review, future access/pricing
shared_parts: global app shell, language packs, core data schema
rule: Each level is a separate learning product and must not depend on Level 1 hard-coding.

independent_parts: audio/images/videos are produced per validated phrase and level
rule: Media serves the sentence/situation; it does not define the lesson.

independent_parts: level map -> sentence content -> cleanup -> audio -> images -> videos -> QA
rule: No media production before sentence/situation approval.
